fullText: JUST IN: German Chancellor Merz says the U.S. remains Germany’s top ally & that Iran “must not” acquire nuclear weapons.

fullText: JUST IN: Trump announces the U.S. will launch “Project Freedom” on Monday to escort stranded ships out of the Strait of Hormuz.
